title: inspect: printTmpl must Flush writer
body:
Flush should be called after the last formatting call to ensure that any data buffered in the Writer is written to output.
Any incomplete escape sequence at the end is considered complete for formatting purposes.

Fixes: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/8785

comments.body: We would need to backport this once fix is confirmed.

LGTM
Couldn't we use the reproducer to create a test?

Looks like we have the same code in cmd/podman.pods/inspect.og

 $ grep -r t.Execute .
./cmd/podman/pods/inspect.go:	return t.Execute(w, *responses)
./cmd/podman/inspect/inspect.go:	return t.Execute(w, data)
I am not sure this is critical enough to back port.  It should get released in podman 3.4.
@rhatdan oh i see its in pod inspect as well let me fix that as well in the same PR thanks for sharing
